title: FMD - Disconnecting/Connecting earbuds to see how it is displayed on the list and map
scenario: Find My Device list and map display behavior for earbuds and charge case varies by device model when disconnecting and reconnecting earbuds in Poly Lens Menu
steps: 1. Open the Poly Studio Mobile app on your Android device.
2. Navigate to the Home screen and ensure both earbuds are connected to the app.
3. Tap the Menu icon (hamburger menu) and select 'Find My Device' from the Poly Lens Menu.
4. Verify that both earbuds and the charge case are displayed on the Find My Device list and map.
5. Disconnect only the right earbud (e.g., place it back in the charge case and close the lid, or turn off Bluetooth on the earbud).
6. Return to the Find My Device screen and observe the status of the right earbud, left earbud, and charge case on the list and map.
7. Disconnect both earbuds (e.g., place both in the charge case and close the lid, or disable Bluetooth on both).
8. Return to the Find My Device screen and observe the status of both earbuds and the charge case on the list and map.
9. Reconnect the right earbud only (e.g., remove it from the charge case and allow it to pair).
10. Return to the Find My Device screen and observe the status of the right earbud, left earbud, and charge case on the list and map.
11. Reconnect both earbuds (e.g., remove both from the charge case and allow them to pair).
12. Return to the Find My Device screen and observe the final status of both earbuds and the charge case on the list and map.
expected:
Expected behavior varies by device model: 
- Osprey: Both earbuds and charge case appear on the Find My Device list and map. When disconnected, earbuds are tagged as "Disconnected" and the charge case may show as "Connected" if it has its own Bluetooth connection. When reconnected, earbuds are tagged as "Connected".
- Tern/Emu: Both earbuds and charge case appear on the Find My Device list and map. Disconnected earbuds show as "Disconnected"; the charge case may show as "Connected" independently. Reconnected earbuds show as "Connected".
- Flamingo: Both earbuds and charge case appear on the Find My Device list and map. Disconnected earbuds show as "Disconnected"; the charge case may show as "Connected" independently. Reconnected earbuds show as "Connected".
